criteria.description: The sonarcloud job wires sonar.projectVersion from pyproject.toml (SC-001a static YAML-parse assertion) and the extraction returns pyproject's version
criteria.evidence: WP01 (319cc5c): tests/ci/test_sonar_projectversion_wired.py + tests/ci/test_sonar_project_version.py, 14 red→green; reviewer re-ran red-first against base
criteria.notes: SC-001b (live baseline reset) is a labelled post-merge observation on the next nightly cron / dispatch, not a PR-gate criterion

criteria.description: Version is single-sourced from pyproject.toml (no hardcode/duplicate); survives a bump; extraction raises, never emits empty
criteria.evidence: WP01: test_projectversion_is_not_hardcoded reds a hardcoded-literal mutant; a silent-'' mutant reds exactly 7 raises-not-empty tests; workflow guards [ -z "$version" ] && exit 1

criteria.description: Sonar-vs-internal coverage scope investigated (unauthenticated API) and reconciled in a committed doc; config change only if a genuine misconfig (none found — C-002)
criteria.evidence: WP03 (c1137e5): docs/guides/coverage-signals.md — file-set + philosophy both differ, no sources/exclusions misconfig; evidence gathered via WP02 tool, no SONAR_TOKEN; no code scope-narrowing (would mask debt)
criteria.notes: documentation deliverable — artifact inspection, not an automated test

criteria.description: The coverage-scope doc is discoverable (linked from docs/guides/index.md), not orphaned
criteria.evidence: WP03: docs/guides/index.md links coverage-signals.md (Contributor guides + related: frontmatter)

criteria.description: scripts/ci/sonarcloud_branch_review.sh authored, tracked, read-only (GET-only), 5 subcommands incl. version/analyses
criteria.evidence: WP02 (3942b1c): read-only proven statically (grep: no POST/PUT/DELETE/-X) + at runtime (stubbed-curl call-log asserts every call is --get); shellcheck clean
criteria.notes: single centralized _http_get seam; version/analyses backs SC-001b

criteria.description: The tool has a token-free, offline (fixture-backed) smoke test that passes in CI
criteria.evidence: Runs in the named CI shard integration-tests-core-misc `misc` (.github/workflows/ci-quality.yml): the file carries pytest.mark.integration and `tests/ci` is a positional path of that shard, whose selector `not windows_ci and (git_repo or integration or architectural)` collects all 20 smoke tests. Proven token-free/offline: `env -u SONAR_TOKEN pytest tests/ci/test_sonarcloud_branch_review.py` → 20 passed, no network (unmapped endpoint → exit 99), 6 jq-valid fixtures. Collection proof: `pytest tests/ci -m 'not windows_ci and (git_repo or integration or architectural)' --collect-only` → 20/34 (was 0/34 pre-fix). scripts/ci/** + tests/ci/** are in the core_misc dorny group and on.push/pull_request.paths so a tool/extractor change re-runs the shard.
criteria.notes: Pre-merge CI-topology fix (refs #2421/#2422): the marker-less smoke test was collected by NO CI shard; it is now integration-marked and routed into the integration-tests-core-misc `misc` shard. tests/architectural orphan gate (test_no_new_orphan_surfaces) + zero-orphan gate (test_split_preserves_zero_orphans) + marker-convention gate now green.

negative_invariants.description: No new SONAR_TOKEN / secret requirement is introduced; the projectVersion extraction path takes no token and the tool's smoke test passes with the token unset
negative_invariants.evidence: grep exits 1 — the new projectVersion extraction path has no SONAR_TOKEN dependency; WP02 smoke test separately passes under env -u SONAR_TOKEN (20 passed)

negative_invariants.description: No suppression / ratchet / allowlist introduced; no real SonarCloud finding masked (the coverage work clarifies interpretation, it does not narrow Sonar scope)
negative_invariants.verification_command: grep -rnE 'noqa|type: ignore|NOSONAR|shellcheck disable' scripts/ci/sonar_project_version.py scripts/ci/sonarcloud_branch_review.sh tests/ci/ docs/guides/coverage-signals.md
negative_invariants.evidence: grep exits 1 — no suppressions in any new file; sonar-project.properties sources/exclusions untouched (WP03 explicitly declined to narrow scope)
